candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label; identical to Net Sales and clearly represents total revenue.
Also a valid top-line revenue label and equals Total Revenue in the preview; useful as fallback if label changes by year.
Not revenue; this is cost line.
Operating expense, not revenue.
Expense component, not revenue.
COGS component, not revenue.
SG&A component, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Contract assets and other accrued revenue
candidates.why: Balance sheet working-capital asset, not income-statement revenue.

candidates.row_label: Contract liabilities and other deferred revenue
candidates.why: Balance sheet liability, not recognized revenue.

variables.notes: Priority list for revenue label changes across years; use Total Revenue first, then Net Sales.

candidates.why: Direct COGS label; best match for cost of sales.
Also a valid COGS label but appears to duplicate Cost of goods sold.

variables.notes: Chose the most direct COGS label and avoided duplicate alternative label.

candidates.why: Explicit populated SG&A-type row above operating result; best primary overhead bucket.
Component/sub-line under the broader sales/marketing/admin bucket, so less preferred than the full populated row.
Overhead component, but subsumed within the broader sales/marketing/admin row.
Dedicated R&D line above operating result; include in XSGA as well when R&D is separate so XSGA-XRD removes it.
R&D component, but less complete than the full R&D costs row.
R&D subcomponent, less preferred than the full R&D costs row.
Possible overhead component but appears unpopulated and less clear than the populated SG&A row.
Explicit SG&A label exists but appears empty; less useful than the populated sales/marketing/admin row.
Broad operating-expense subtotal that would mix in non-SG&A items including R&D; less preferred when explicit SG&A exists.
Could be overhead-related but appears more like a heading and is not the best mapped row.
Could be part of SG&A, but standalone supplemental line and likely embedded already in operating expenses.
Balance sheet asset, not income-statement SG&A expense.
Balance sheet liability, not income-statement SG&A expense.

variables.notes: Selected the populated explicit SG&A row. Added the separate above-EBIT R&D row as required so that PROF can compute SG&A excluding R&D via XSGA_COMPONENTS - XRD.

candidates.why: R&D-related but only D&A component, not full R&D expense.
Dedicated full R&D expense line above operating result; best match.
Core R&D component but not the full R&D costs subtotal.
R&D subcomponent, not the full R&D line.

variables.notes: Priority list uses the dedicated above-EBIT full R&D line first, with the core component row as fallback if labeling changes.

candidates.why: Broad finance-cost line; usable fallback if specific interest expense is unavailable.
Direct interest expense label; best match.
Finance expense but not specifically interest.
Specific interest subtype; useful fallback/additional label across years, but narrower than total interest expenses.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental lease-interest line, narrower and less preferred than main interest expense.

variables.notes: Priority list for interest expense label variation; prefer direct interest expense, then broad financial expenses, then lease-interest subtype.

candidates.why: Conceptually close, but appears empty in preview and less preferred than explicit owners-of-parent equity.

candidates.row_label: Total equity attributable to owners of parent company
candidates.why: Best book equity measure because it excludes non-controlling interests.
Includes non-controlling interests, so less preferred when owner-only equity is available.
Balancing row, not a substantive equity measure.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing row, not equity.
Total balance sheet, not equity.

final_choice.row_label: Total equity attributable to owners of parent company

variables.notes: Preferred owner/parent equity line to exclude non-controlling interests from BE.

candidates.why: Income-statement attribution line, but MIB should come from balance sheet when available.
Income-statement attribution line, less preferred than balance-sheet NCI.
Direct balance-sheet minority interest / non-controlling interest line.

variables.notes: Used the balance-sheet non-controlling interests line to avoid double counting with BE.
